title: Rowecvce 36 Pack Galaxy Slime Balls for Kids - Stretchy, Non-Sticky, Mess-Free Stress Relief Toys, Party Favors, Classroom Rewards, Goodie Bag Stuffers for Boys & Girls
features: 36 PACK GALAXY SLIMES BALLS:Our galaxy slime ball kit consists of 3 colors of balls, each galaxy slime ball consists of 4 colors, it will definitely not disappoint the kids
NO-STICKY AND NO-MESS:Our slime is soft, non-stick, easy to clean and perfect for indoor and outdoor use
FUN AND STRESS RELIEF:Our galaxy slime balls are slightly bouncy, smooth and fun, perfect for stress relief toys for adults and kids
SAFE AND SECURE:Our products are made of high-quality raw materials, so that children can play safely and happily, and parents can rest assured

SLIME PARTY FAVORS:Our galaxy slime balls are suitable for all kinds of parties, birthdays, Easter, Valentine's Day, Halloween, Christmas, and are a must-have for every party, and can be used as class rewards, children's party gifts, candy bag fillers, Easter fillers, pinata fillers, etc
